items.title: Structural code design
items.body: AISC 360-22 members (Ch. E compression + F LTB W/C/HSS/pipe/angle + H combined) + bolted/welded connections + base-plate (LRFD+ASD); ACI 318-19 flexure/shear/PM/development-length + punching-shear §22.6 + torsion §22.7; NDS 2018 timber (full adjustment factors); ASCE 7-22 LRFD+ASD load combos + ELF + RSA (SRSS+CQC) + Newmark time-history seismic (SDOF 0.07 % error). Full Eurocode coverage: EC2 (concrete flexure/shear/punching/deflection) + EC3 (steel members/connections) + EC5 (timber, NDS-parity) + EC8 (spectrum/LFM/RSA)

items.title: Native FE
items.body: MITC4 (Bathe-Dvorkin) plate/shell element with consistent mass matrix + modal analysis via inverse iteration (1.29 % error vs Timoshenko at 16×16); 2D/3D frame stiffness assembler with ASCE 7 LRFD/ASD combos + story drift (machine-precision validated); geotech liquefaction triggering (Seed-Idriss CSR + SPT/CPT CRR + Tokimatsu, Loma Prieta validated); multi-axial critical-plane fatigue — Findley, SWT-3D, Brown-Miller

items.title: Machine elements depth
items.body: ISO 6336 gear rating Method B (safety factors ZH=2.495, ZE=191 √MPa validated); ISO/TS 16281 bearing aISO modified life (Lnm, contamination + misalignment); planetary gearbox (3 Willis modes + compound, torque identity to 1e-10); multi-axial fatigue folded in

items.title: Thermo-fluid depth
items.body: IAPWS-IF97 steam properties Regions 1/2/4 validated to <1e-3 vs reference tables; Bell-Delaware shell-and-tube HX (full TEMA layout + 5 correction factors + ΔP both sides, Kern U≈504 validated); transient pipe-network (MOC waterhammer + quasi-steady + surge-tank); ASHRAE CLTD/RTS transient cooling loads (Sol-air + fenestration, ASHRAE Ch. 18)

items.title: Electronics / power depth
items.body: IBIS-AMI signal integrity (IBIS 5.1 parser + Bergeron channel + PRBS eye envelope); AC PDN impedance sweep + target-Z + decap optimiser; AC load-flow Newton-Raphson polar-form (3+5-bus validated); protection coordination IEC 60255 U1-U5 + IEEE C37.112 + IEEE 1584-2018 arc-flash incident energy; photonics fibre-optic link budget

items.title: Aero / marine / space depth
items.body: 3D VLM with viscous strip drag + Prandtl-Glauert/Kármán-Tsien compressibility + Korn-Lock wave-drag (PG 1.401× exact); strip-theory seakeeping RAOs (Lewis-form STF + JONSWAP, Wigley validated); Holtrop-Mennen naval resistance + EHP; multi-revolution Lambert (Lancaster-Blanchard / Izzo 2015, sub-mm propagation residual N=1/N=2); 6-DOF flight dynamics + ADCS test stand

items.title: Manufacturing depth
items.body: adaptive/trochoidal CAM HSM (iterative offset + 50 % trochoid overlap, engagement on target) + rest machining (grid-based uncleared region); Taylor extended tool-life model (vcT^n·f^a·dp^b=C) + Gilbert economic speed; moldflow Hele-Shaw front tracking + weld-line detection + air-trap prediction; casting shrinkage table + Chvorinov solidification + riser sizing + gating design; NFP true-shape polygon nesting (Minkowski-sum + IFP + bottom-left fill, 57.6 % L-shape utilisation); sheet-metal bend table (K-factor/BD/spring-back per material/thickness)

items.title: Verticals depth
items.body: dental anatomic crown (multi-cusp fan construction, not placeholder cylinder); horology Swiss lever escapement + mainspring barrel + balance-wheel oscillator (isochronism correction); solar PV partial shading + bypass-diode IV + global MPPT + mismatch loss (60-cell P=255 W validated); Bell-Delaware HX (D4 + D13 overlap)

items.title: Tolerancing / QA depth
items.body: 3D vector-loop tolerance stackup (6-DOF Jacobian sensitivity, `tolstack/tol3d.py`); SPC control charts (Shewhart/CUSUM/EWMA + Nelson/WECO run rules, `spc/charts.py`); ISO 286 limits & fits consolidated

items.title: Optics / acoustics depth
items.body: Gaussian beam propagation (complex-q + ABCD + M² + fibre coupling, HeNe zR=4.96 m validated, ISO 11146-1); non-sequential ray tracing with Fresnel-split traversal + ghost detection (0.01 % ghost fraction validated); wave-domain room acoustics — image-source IR + Schroeder RT60 + modes + SEA (3.1 % error vs Sabine); Seidel S5 corrected (was zero)

items.title: Implicit geometry
items.body: extended TPMS / lattice library: FRep CSG ops (union/intersect/subtract/blend/shell) + implicit domain warps (twist/taper/wave) added to `kerf_cad_core.frep.csg`

items.title: Silicon
items.body: analog PVT corner simulation: 60 corners (5 process × 3 voltage × 4 temperature) + Monte-Carlo mismatch per corner; bandgap ±31 mV, Pelgrom σ matched (`silicon/analog/pvt.py`)

items.title: Materials + LCA
items.body: Ashby database expanded to ~200 materials (14 families) with Pareto frontier multi-objective selection (`matsel/multi_objective.py`); full ISO 14040/44 LCA (4 phases: cradle/use/transport/EoL; impact categories: GWP/AP/EP/HTP/water/PM2.5 + Monte-Carlo uncertainty, `kerf-lca/phases.py`)

items.title: Modelica / DAE
items.body: system-simulation component library expanded to 16 components spanning mechanical / hydraulic / pneumatic / thermal / control

items.title: Compare matrices
items.body: structured feature-matrix YAML added for 14 reference CADs: Fusion 360 (+55 rows), SolidWorks (+52), Onshape (+56), FreeCAD (+61), Rhino (+50), KiCad (+39), CATIA (+52), Creo (+54), NX (+54), Inventor (+53), AutoCAD (+41), Altium (+41), Revit (+41), Blender (+42) — 741 grounded rows total, sourced to vendor documentation

items.title: Landing / SEO
items.body: persona-led marketing funnel restructure (14 sections, all 25 illustrations rendered); SEO meta (title/description/OG/Twitter/JSON-LD SoftwareApplication schema)

items.title: Domain pages
items.body: all 23 per-domain pages now have hero illustrations and capability illustrations wired in via `DomainPage` `heroIllustration` + `capabilityIllustrations` props (new vitest coverage)

items.title: Security hardening
items.body: `/run-topo` route now requires auth (`Depends(require_auth)`); NFP `grid_step` clamped to prevent resource exhaustion; PVT `n_mc` clamped; silicon synthesis blocks Yosys module-name injection

items.title: Infra refactor
items.body: extracted shared `_guard_*` input-validation helpers into `kerf_cad_core._guards` module; applied across 68 files (−2009 / +129 lines net)
